rulings.Case Title: AMANDA WORNUM MALLORY et al VS. SQUIRE KNOWLES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 17, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFFS AMANDA MALLORY, CHRISTOPHER WORNUM, CLAUDIA WORNUM AND GEORGE WORNUM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiffs' Motion for Summary Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. Untimely per CCP 437c; 75-day notice minimum. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 324 LARKIN STREET, LP VS. AYMAN SHEHADEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 17, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT AYMAN SHEHADEH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently and properly alleges alternate legal theories. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that landlord's approval of himself as a subtenant creates an approved sub tenancy. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ABDEL KADAR CHENBOD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Omtion To Compel Defts Written Discovery Repsonses And Production Of Documents, Deem Matters Admitted, And Request For Monetary Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 17, 2013, line 9 - PLAINTIFF ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendants Written Discovery Repsonses And Production Of Documents, Deem Matters Admitted, And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion for Compel Discovery Responses and Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Attorney's fess granted in the amount of $2,200. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT TRUMBULL VS. FELIX FUENTES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 17, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANTs FELIX FUENTES and DENA FUENTES' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendants' Motion to Quash Service of Summons is GRANTED. Plaintiff is not entitled to presumption and failed to sustain burden.
